name: Minestrone in Minutes (Potato Board)
recipeIngredient: 2/3 lb (2 medium) potatoes, cut into 1/2-inch cubes
1 can (8 3/4 ounces) Red kidney beans, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3-quart saucepan over medium heat, sauté onions and garlic in oil for 5 minutes.
2. Add broth and potatoes; bring to a boil. Reduce heat, cover, and cook until the potatoes are just tender, about 10 minutes.
3. Add vegetables, beans, and herb seasoning. Cover and simmer for another 10 minutes.
4. Ladle into bowls. Sprinkle each serving with cheese if desired.
5. Makes 4 servings
